originalTitle: Microsoft hasn’t ruled out spinning off Xbox
summary: Microsoft is preparing to lay off a significant chunk of its Xbox division and is reevaluating the plans for its next-generation Project Helix console. It's apparently also considering dramatically restructuring its relationship with Xbox, and hasn't ruled out spinning it off into a separate company. A new report from The Information suggests that Microsoft has […]
content: Microsoft is preparing to lay off a significant chunk of its Xbox division and is reevaluating the plans for its next-generation Project Helix console. It’s apparently also considering dramatically restructuring its relationship with Xbox, and hasn’t ruled out spinning it off into a separate company. A new report from The Information suggests that Microsoft has considered some dramatic measures to make its Xbox unit more sustainable. That includes turning it into a wholly owned subsidiary, a joint venture, or even spinning it off entirely, with the possibility of selling the business. The report doesn’t suggest anything is imminent, but it does seem that new Xbox CEO Asha Sharma and Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella haven’t taken anything off the table when it comes to the future of Xbox. Sharma has won approval to invest heavily in tentpole titles like Halo and Fallout. The former hasn’t seen a new release since 2021, and the last mainline Fallout title was Fallout 4 in 2015. She has also said that major upcoming releases Gears of War: E-Day and Clockwork Revolution would be Xbox exclusive. Though this investment in its most popular franchises is likely to come at the expense of smaller studios and games that have failed to live up to sales expectations.
chineseTitle: 微软并未排除分拆 Xbox 的可能性
chineseSummary: 微软正准备裁掉其 Xbox 部门的大部分员工，并重新评估其下一代 Project Helix 游戏机的计划。显然，它还在考虑大幅重组与 Xbox 的关系，并且不排除将其分拆为一家独立公司的可能性。 The Information 的一份新报告表明，微软 [...]
chineseContent: 微软正准备裁掉其 Xbox 部门的大部分员工，并重新评估其下一代 Project Helix 游戏机的计划。显然，它还在考虑大幅重组与 Xbox 的关系，并且不排除将其分拆为一家独立公司的可能性。 The Information 的一份新报告显示，微软已经考虑采取一些重大措施，以使其 Xbox 部门更具可持续性。这包括将其转变为全资子公司、合资企业，甚至完全分拆，并有可能出售业务。该报告并没有暗示任何事情即将发生，但新任 Xbox 首席执行官阿莎·夏尔马 (Asha Sharma) 和微软首席执行官萨蒂亚·纳德拉 (Satya Nadella) 似乎在谈到 Xbox 的未来时并没有放弃任何建议。夏尔马已获得批准对《光环》和《辐射》等热门游戏进行大力投资。前者自 2021 年以来就没有发布过新版本，最后一款主线《辐射》游戏是 2015 年的《辐射 4》。她还表示，即将发布的主要游戏《战争机器：E-Day》和《发条革命》将是 Xbox 独占。不过，对其最受欢迎的特许经营权的投资可能会以牺牲未能达到销售预期的小型工作室和游戏为代价。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
